    private static void
    OfxV2Writer.writeInvestmentSection(XMLStreamWriter writer, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData inv)
    Writes the INVSTMTMSGSRSV1 section containing investment account info and cash balance.
    static void
    OfxV2Writer.writeOfxFile(String filePath, OfxV2Writer.SignonData signon, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> bankTxns, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo bankInfo, BigDecimal bankLedgerBalance, String bankLedgerAsOf, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData> creditCardTxns, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo ccInfo, BigDecimal ccLedgerBalance, String ccLedgerAsOf, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData investment)
